prompt: I want to use the dial/encoder on my Stream Deck Plus to control my Mac's system volume. Rotating clockwise increases volume, counter-clockwise decreases it. Pressing the encoder toggles mute. The LCD strip should show the current volume percentage. Use osascript to get and set system volume.
assertions: package.json includes sharp as a dependency
deck.on('rotate') handler is present for encoder rotation
osascript is used to get or set system volume
Rotation is debounced or throttled to avoid flooding osascript calls
Encoder press (deck.on 'down' with encoder type) toggles mute
fillLcd or equivalent is called to update the LCD strip
Volume percentage is shown on the LCD display
